graph order
84
adjacency matrix

label vector
59 57 7 67 14 3 71 13 10 11 70 80 51 45 33 24 28 17 73 48 50 27 78 72 40 1 6 4 64 75 65 52 81 44 84 56 25 12 35 20 22 31 34 38 66 16 41 58 18 36 37 2 46 23 82 74 60 61 79 76 21 43 19 30 26 49 69 9 68 32 53 39 29 15 8 5 62 55 77 42 63 54 83 47
